nodes.name: Daily 6 AM ET
nodes.notes: Triggers every morning at 6:00 AM Eastern. Workflow timezone is set to America/New_York in Settings.

nodes.name: Fetch Disney Parks Blog RSS
nodes.notes: Pulls Disney Parks Blog RSS as raw text. URL is the new disneyparksblog.com host (the old disneyparks.disney.go.com URL 301s here and hangs without a UA). Browser-style User-Agent is required; the site silently drops requests with no UA instead of returning 403. Timeout 60s + 3 retries.

nodes.name: Fetch themeparks.wiki destinations
nodes.notes: Park-status secondary source for current closures/refurbs. UA + 60s timeout + retry as defence-in-depth.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: disney parks OR disneyland OR "walt disney world" OR "magic kingdom" OR epcot OR "hollywood studios" OR "animal kingdom"

nodes.name: YouTube — Search recent (48h)
nodes.notes: YouTube Data API v3 — search videos uploaded in the last 48h. Requires a Generic Query Auth credential named 'YouTube API Key' with name=key, value=<your YouTube API key>.

nodes.name: YouTube — Get video stats
nodes.notes: Fetches snippet + statistics (incl. viewCount) for the search-result IDs. Reuses the same 'YouTube API Key' credential.

nodes.name: Rank Top 10 by views
nodes.notes: Sorts the YouTube results by viewCount and keeps the top 10. Output: { videos: [...] }.

nodes.name: Build research context
nodes.notes: Bundles RSS + themeparks.wiki + the top-10 video ranking into a single object the LLM can read. Computes today's slug + display date in Eastern Time.

nodes.name: Compose with Claude
nodes.notes: Calls Claude (claude-sonnet-4-5) with the research context. Hardcoded guardrails forbid invented breaking news; videos must be copied from the upstream ranking.

nodes.name: Validate + format JSON
nodes.notes: Parses the LLM output, validates the shape against lib/guideDaily.ts, attaches AI metadata, and produces the file payload for GitHub. Throws (stops the workflow) on any schema violation — skip a day rather than ship a broken post.

nodes.name: Commit to GitHub
nodes.notes: Commits the JSON to content/guide/daily/{slug}.json on main. Cloudflare Pages auto-rebuilds on push — post is live within ~60–90s.

nodes.name: Wait 90s for Cloudflare deploy
nodes.notes: Wait for Cloudflare Pages to rebuild. Beehiiv teaser must link to a live URL.

nodes.name: Build email teaser
nodes.notes: Constructs the Beehiiv teaser-only payload: 1–2 sentence teaser + 3 bullets (breaking → bignews → topstories) + CTA link. NO YouTube content, NO section bodies. The website is the canonical copy.

nodes.name: Beehiiv — Create Post (DRAFT)
nodes.notes: DISABLED until Beehiiv API key is created (requires Stripe ID verification). When ready: enable this node, add an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Beehiiv API' with header name='X-API-Key' and value=<your Beehiiv API key>. Posts are created as DRAFT for manual review until the workflow is trusted; flip status to 'confirmed' inside 'Build email teaser' to auto-send.
